twitch_info.title: [ES/EN/PT(BR)] I Wanna Get Cultured 2 | Session I

I just got bored and began browsing the DVD special features for Spy Kids 3D
Up there with the classics such as Citizen Kane and Shrek
Spy Kids is culturally, historically, and aesthetically significant tho lol
Even then in the DVD behind the scenes you can tell everyone involved had a lot of fun which is nice
There's a clip of Alexa Vega singing at the film's premiere and then it cuts to two flamenco guitarists absolutely shredding
I love the fact that a Spy Kids 35mm probably exists out there in the world

In all the DVDs for the trilogy there's a Robert Rodriguez "ten minute film school" where he runs down the making of and special effects, it's oddly charming because he also gives some advice to young filmmakers
